title: On The Rise
content:
Filled up today .. gas price has reached 29 baht already. So I look back at my record. And here it is (Jan'03 - Jan'07).

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/04/gp03-07.png)

Actually, the price did went up to 30.19 baht during August last year. Hmmm ...

As for this year's record, it looks like a ladder to a sacred mountain.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/04/gp07.png)

And the trend is up. --"
